    "tool_input":  {
                       "filePath":  "c:\\git\\VetAmb\\McpTools\\ClinicMcpTools.cs",
                       "content":  "using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.ComponentModel;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing ModelContextProtocol.Server;\nusing VetAmb.Models;\nusing VetAmb.Repositories;\n\nnamespace VetAmb.McpTools;\n\n[McpServerToolType]\n[Description(\"MCP tools for creating, retrieving, searching, updating, and soft-deleting veterinary clinics.\")]\npublic sealed class ClinicMcpTools\n{\n    private readonly IClinicRepository _clinicRepository;\n\n    public ClinicMcpTools(IClinicRepository clinicRepository)\n    {\n        _clinicRepository = clinicRepository;\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Create a new clinic record. Inputs: clinic name, address, phone, email, foundation date, max capacity, and registration number. Returns the created clinic including generated ID and summary relationship counts.\")]\n    public ClinicToolDto CreateClinic(\n        [Description(\"Human-readable clinic name.\")] string? name,\n        [Description(\"Street address or location descriptor for the clinic.\")] string? address,\n        [Description(\"Primary phone number for the clinic.\")] string? phone,\n        [Description(\"Primary contact email for the clinic.\")] string? email,\n        [Description(\"Date the clinic was founded.\")] DateTime foundationDate,\n        [Description(\"Maximum number of patients the clinic can handle in active capacity.\")] int maxCapacity,\n        [Description(\"Internal or legal registration identifier for the clinic.\")] string? registrationNumber)\n    {\n        var clinic = new Clinic\n        {\n            Name = name,\n            Address = address,\n            Phone = phone,\n            Email = email,\n            FoundationDate = foundationDate,\n            MaxCapacity = maxCapacity,\n            RegistrationNumber = registrationNumber\n        };\n\n        _clinicRepository.Add(clinic);\n        var created = _clinicRepository.GetById(clinic.Id) ?? clinic;\n        return ToDto(created);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Get one clinic by numeric ID. Returns full clinic scalar fields plus counts of related vets and owners. Throws an error if no clinic exists with the provided ID.\")]\n    public ClinicToolDto GetClinic(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the clinic to retrieve.\")] int id)\n    {\n        var clinic = _clinicRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Clinic with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        return ToDto(clinic);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Search clinics by free-text term across name, address, and registration number. Returns a list of matching clinic summaries. Pass empty text to return all non-deleted clinics.\")]\n    public IReadOnlyList\u003cClinicToolDto\u003e SearchClinics(\n        [Description(\"Free-text filter term used against clinic name, address, and registration number.\")] string? searchTerm)\n    {\n        var results = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm)\n            ? _clinicRepository.GetAll()\n            : _clinicRepository.Search(searchTerm);\n\n        return results.Select(ToDto).ToList();\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Update an existing clinic by ID. Only provided fields are changed; omitted fields remain unchanged. Returns the updated clinic summary.\")]\n    public ClinicToolDto UpdateClinic(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the clinic to update.\")] int id,\n        [Description(\"New clinic name. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? name = null,\n        [Description(\"New clinic address. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? address = null,\n        [Description(\"New clinic phone. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? phone = null,\n        [Description(\"New clinic email. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? email = null,\n        [Description(\"New foundation date. Omit to keep current value.\")] DateTime? foundationDate = null,\n        [Description(\"New max capacity. Returns operation status text.\")]\n    public string DeleteService(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the service to soft-delete.\")] int id)\n    {\n        var service = _serviceRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Service with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        _serviceRepository.SoftDelete(id);\n        return $\"Service {service.Id} soft-deleted successfully.\";\n    }\n\n    private static ServiceToolDto ToDto(Service service)\n    {\n        return new ServiceToolDto(\n            service.Id,\n            service.Name,\n            service.Description,\n            service.Price,\n            service.EstimatedDurationMinutes,\n            service.AppointmentServices.Count);\n    }\n\n    public sealed record ServiceToolDto(\n        int Id,\n        string? Inputs: diagnosis, treatment, record date, notes, and patient ID. Returns the created medical record summary.\")]\n    public MedicalRecordToolDto CreateMedicalRecord(\n        [Description(\"Diagnosis or clinical assessment text.\")] string? diagnosis,\n        [Description(\"Treatment plan or performed intervention.\")] string? treatment,\n        [Description(\"Date of this medical record entry.\")] DateTime recordDate,\n        [Description(\"Additional clinician notes.\")] string? notes,\n        [Description(\"Foreign key ID of the patient this record belongs to.\")] int patientId)\n    {\n        var record = new MedicalRecord\n        {\n            Diagnosis = diagnosis,\n            Treatment = treatment,\n            RecordDate = recordDate,\n            Notes = notes,\n            PatientId = patientId\n        };\n\n        _medicalRecordRepository.Add(record);\n        var created = _medicalRecordRepository.GetById(record.Id) ?? record;\n        return ToDto(created);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Get one medical record by ID. Returns diagnosis and linkage information. Throws an error if no record exists for the provided ID.\")]\n    public MedicalRecordToolDto GetMedicalRecord(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the medical record to retrieve.\")] int id)\n    {\n        var record = _medicalRecordRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Medical record with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        return ToDto(record);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Search medical records by diagnosis, treatment, notes, or patient name. Record is retained with DeletedAt set and excluded from normal queries. Returns operation status text.\")]\n    public string DeleteMedicalRecord(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the medical record to soft-delete.\")] int id)\n    {\n        var record = _medicalRecordRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Medical record with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        _medicalRecordRepository.SoftDelete(id);\n        return $\"Medical record {record.Id} soft-deleted successfully.\";\n    }\n\n    private static MedicalRecordToolDto ToDto(MedicalRecord record)\n    {\n        return new MedicalRecordToolDto(\n            record.Id,\n            record.Diagnosis,\n            record.Treatment,\n            record.RecordDate,\n            record.Notes,\n            record.PatientId,\n            record.Patient?.Name);\n    }\n\n    public sealed record MedicalRecordToolDto(\n        int Id,\n        string? Inputs: date/time, reason, status enum text, notes, reschedule reason, patient ID, vet ID, and optional service IDs. Returns the created appointment summary with linked services.\")]\n    public AppointmentToolDto CreateAppointment(\n        [Description(\"Date and time when the appointment is scheduled.\")] DateTime appointmentDateTime,\n        [Description(\"Primary appointment reason.\")] string? reason,\n        [Description(\"Appointment status enum text: Scheduled, InProgress, Completed, Cancelled, NoShow, Rescheduled.\")] string status,\n        [Description(\"Optional clinical notes.\")] string? notes,\n        [Description(\"Optional reason for rescheduling if status is Rescheduled.\")] string? rescheduleReason,\n        [Description(\"Foreign key ID of the patient.\")] int patientId,\n        [Description(\"Foreign key ID of the veterinarian.\")] int vetId,\n        [Description(\"Optional list of service IDs to attach to this appointment.\")] int[]? serviceIds = null)\n    {\n        var parsedStatus = ParseStatus(status);\n\n        var appointment = new Appointment\n        {\n            AppointmentDateTime = appointmentDateTime,\n            Reason = reason,\n            Status = parsedStatus,\n            Notes = notes,\n            RescheduleReason = rescheduleReason,\n            PatientId = patientId,\n            VetId = vetId\n        };\n\n        _appointmentRepository.Add(appointment);\n\n        if (serviceIds is { Length: \u003e 0 })\n        {\n            var distinctServiceIds = serviceIds.Distinct().ToArray();\n            foreach (var serviceId in distinctServiceIds)\n            {\n                _dbContext.AppointmentServices.Add(new AppointmentService\n                {\n                    AppointmentId = appointment.Id,\n                    ServiceId = serviceId\n                });\n            }\n\n            _dbContext.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        var created = _appointmentRepository.GetById(appointment.Id) ?? appointment;\n        return ToDto(created);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Get one appointment by ID. Returns appointment fields plus patient, vet, and linked service IDs. Throws an error if not found.\")]\n    public AppointmentToolDto GetAppointment(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the appointment to fetch.\")] int id)\n    {\n        var appointment = _appointmentRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Appointment with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        return ToDto(appointment);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Search appointments by reason, notes, reschedule reason, patient name, or vet name. Returns all non-deleted appointments when term is empty.\")]\n    public IReadOnlyList\u003cAppointmentToolDto\u003e SearchAppointments(\n        [Description(\"Free-text filter term for appointment search.\")] string? searchTerm)\n    {\n        var results = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm)\n            ? _appointmentRepository.GetAll()\n            : _appointmentRepository.Search(searchTerm);\n\n        return results.Select(ToDto).ToList();\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Update an appointment by ID. Any omitted argument stays unchanged. If serviceIds is provided, linked services are replaced exactly by that list. Returns updated appointment summary.\")]\n    public AppointmentToolDto UpdateAppointment(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the appointment to update.\")] int id,\n        [Description(\"Updated date/time. Omit to keep current value.\")] DateTime? appointmentDateTime = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated reason. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? reason = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated status enum text. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? status = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated notes. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? notes = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated reschedule reason. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? rescheduleReason = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated patient ID. Omit to keep current value.\")] int? patientId = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated vet ID. Omit to keep current value.\")] int? vetId = null,\n        [Description(\"Optional full replacement list of linked service IDs.\")] int[]? serviceIds = null)\n    {\n        var appointment = _appointmentRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Appointment with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        if (appointmentDateTime.HasValue) appointment.AppointmentDateTime = appointmentDateTime.Value;\n        if (reason is not null) appointment.Reason = reason;\n        if (status is not null) appointment.Status = ParseStatus(status);\n        if (notes is not null) appointment.Notes = notes;\n        if (rescheduleReason is not null) appointment.RescheduleReason = rescheduleReason;\n        if (patientId.HasValue) appointment.PatientId = patientId.Value;\n        if (vetId.HasValue) appointment.VetId = vetId.Value;\n\n        _appointmentRepository.Update(appointment);\n\n        if (serviceIds is not null)\n        {\n            var existing = _dbContext.AppointmentServices\n                .Where(x =\u003e x.AppointmentId == appointment.Id)\n                .ToList();\n\n            if (existing.Count \u003e 0)\n            {\n                _dbContext.AppointmentServices.RemoveRange(existing);\n            }\n\n            var distinctServiceIds = serviceIds.Distinct().ToArray();\n            foreach (var serviceId in distinctServiceIds)\n            {\n                _dbContext.AppointmentServices.Add(new AppointmentService\n                {\n                    AppointmentId = appointment.Id,\n                    ServiceId = serviceId\n                });\n            }\n\n            _dbContext.SaveChanges();\n            appointment = _appointmentRepository.GetById(id) ?? appointment;\n        }\n\n        return ToDto(appointment);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Soft-delete an appointment by ID by setting DeletedAt. Returns a status message.\")]\n    public string DeleteAppointment(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the appointment to soft-delete.\")] int id)\n    {\n        var appointment = _appointmentRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Appointment with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        _appointmentRepository.SoftDelete(id);\n        return $\"Appointment {appointment.Id} soft-deleted successfully.\";\n    }\n\n    private static AppointmentStatus ParseStatus(string status)\n    {\n        if (Enum.TryParse\u003cAppointmentStatus\u003e(status, true, out var parsed))\n        {\n            return parsed;\n        }\n\n        throw new ArgumentException(\n            \"Invalid appointment status. Allowed values: Scheduled, InProgress, Completed, Cancelled, NoShow, Rescheduled.\",\n            nameof(status));\n    }\n\n    private static AppointmentToolDto ToDto(Appointment appointment)\n    {\n        return new AppointmentToolDto(\n            appointment.Id,\n            appointment.AppointmentDateTime,\n            appointment.Reason,\n            appointment.Status.ToString(),\n            appointment.Notes,\n            appointment.RescheduleReason,\n            appointment.PatientId,\n            appointment.Patient?.Name,\n            appointment.VetId,\n            appointment.Vet is null ? null : $\"{appointment.Vet.FirstName} {appointment.Vet.LastName}\".Trim(),\n            appointment.AppointmentServices.Select(x =\u003e x.ServiceId).OrderBy(x =\u003e x).ToArray());\n    }\n\n    public sealed record AppointmentToolDto(\n        int Id,\n        DateTime AppointmentDateTime,\n        string? Reason,\n        string Status,\n        string? Notes,\n        string? RescheduleReason,\n        int PatientId,\n        string? PatientName,\n        int VetId,\n        string? Returns the created appointment summary with linked services.\")]\n    public AppointmentToolDto CreateAppointment(\n        [Description(\"Date and time when the appointment is scheduled.\")] DateTime appointmentDateTime,\n        [Description(\"Primary appointment reason.\")] string? reason,\n        [Description(\"Appointment status enum text: Scheduled, InProgress, Completed, Cancelled, NoShow, Rescheduled.\")] string status,\n        [Description(\"Optional clinical notes.\")] string? notes,\n        [Description(\"Optional reason for rescheduling if status is Rescheduled.\")] string? rescheduleReason,\n        [Description(\"Foreign key ID of the patient.\")] int patientId,\n        [Description(\"Foreign key ID of the veterinarian.\")] int vetId,\n        [Description(\"Optional list of service IDs to attach to this appointment.\")] int[]? serviceIds = null)\n    {\n        var parsedStatus = ParseStatus(status);\n\n        var appointment = new Appointment\n        {\n            AppointmentDateTime = appointmentDateTime,\n            Reason = reason,\n            Status = parsedStatus,\n            Notes = notes,\n            RescheduleReason = rescheduleReason,\n            PatientId = patientId,\n            VetId = vetId\n        };\n\n        _appointmentRepository.Add(appointment);\n\n        if (serviceIds is { Length: \u003e 0 })\n        {\n            var distinctServiceIds = serviceIds.Distinct().ToArray();\n            foreach (var serviceId in distinctServiceIds)\n            {\n                _dbContext.AppointmentServices.Add(new AppointmentService\n                {\n                    AppointmentId = appointment.Id,\n                    ServiceId = serviceId\n                });\n            }\n\n            _dbContext.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        var created = _appointmentRepository.GetById(appointment.Id) ?? appointment;\n        return ToDto(created);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Get one appointment by ID. Returns appointment fields plus patient, vet, and linked service IDs. Throws an error if not found.\")]\n    public AppointmentToolDto GetAppointment(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the appointment to fetch.\")] int id)\n    {\n        var appointment = _appointmentRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Appointment with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        return ToDto(appointment);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Search appointments by reason, notes, reschedule reason, patient name, or vet name. Returns all non-deleted appointments when term is empty.\")]\n    public IReadOnlyList\u003cAppointmentToolDto\u003e SearchAppointments(\n        [Description(\"Free-text filter term for appointment search.\")] string? searchTerm)\n    {\n        var results = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm)\n            ? _appointmentRepository.GetAll()\n            : _appointmentRepository.Search(searchTerm);\n\n        return results.Select(ToDto).ToList();\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Update an appointment by ID. Any omitted argument stays unchanged. If serviceIds is provided, linked services are replaced exactly by that list. Returns updated appointment summary.\")]\n    public AppointmentToolDto UpdateAppointment(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the appointment to update.\")] int id,\n        [Description(\"Updated date/time. Omit to keep current value.\")] DateTime? appointmentDateTime = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated reason. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? reason = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated status enum text. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? status = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated notes. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? notes = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated reschedule reason. Omit to keep current value.\")] string? rescheduleReason = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated patient ID. Omit to keep current value.\")] int? patientId = null,\n        [Description(\"Updated vet ID. Omit to keep current value.\")] int? vetId = null,\n        [Description(\"Optional full replacement list of linked service IDs.\")] int[]? serviceIds = null)\n    {\n        var appointment = _appointmentRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Appointment with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        if (appointmentDateTime.HasValue) appointment.AppointmentDateTime = appointmentDateTime.Value;\n        if (reason is not null) appointment.Reason = reason;\n        if (status is not null) appointment.Status = ParseStatus(status);\n        if (notes is not null) appointment.Notes = notes;\n        if (rescheduleReason is not null) appointment.RescheduleReason = rescheduleReason;\n        if (patientId.HasValue) appointment.PatientId = patientId.Value;\n        if (vetId.HasValue) appointment.VetId = vetId.Value;\n\n        _appointmentRepository.Update(appointment);\n\n        if (serviceIds is not null)\n        {\n            var existing = _dbContext.AppointmentServices\n                .Where(x =\u003e x.AppointmentId == appointment.Id)\n                .ToList();\n\n            if (existing.Count \u003e 0)\n            {\n                _dbContext.AppointmentServices.RemoveRange(existing);\n            }\n\n            var distinctServiceIds = serviceIds.Distinct().ToArray();\n            foreach (var serviceId in distinctServiceIds)\n            {\n                _dbContext.AppointmentServices.Add(new AppointmentService\n                {\n                    AppointmentId = appointment.Id,\n                    ServiceId = serviceId\n                });\n            }\n\n            _dbContext.SaveChanges();\n            appointment = _appointmentRepository.GetById(id) ?? appointment;\n        }\n\n        return ToDto(appointment);\n    }\n\n    [McpServerTool]\n    [Description(\"Soft-delete an appointment by ID by setting DeletedAt. Returns a status message.\")]\n    public string DeleteAppointment(\n        [Description(\"Primary key ID of the appointment to soft-delete.\")] int id)\n    {\n        var appointment = _appointmentRepository.GetById(id)\n            ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($\"Appointment with ID {id} was not found.\");\n\n        _appointmentRepository.SoftDelete(id);\n        return $\"Appointment {appointment.Id} soft-deleted successfully.\";\n    }\n\n    private static AppointmentStatus ParseStatus(string status)\n    {\n        if (Enum.TryParse\u003cAppointmentStatus\u003e(status, true, out var parsed))\n        {\n            return parsed;\n        }\n\n        throw new ArgumentException(\n            \"Invalid appointment status. Allowed values: Scheduled, InProgress, Completed, Cancelled, NoShow, Rescheduled.\",\n            nameof(status));\n    }\n\n    private static AppointmentToolDto ToDto(Appointment appointment)\n    {\n        return new AppointmentToolDto(\n            appointment.Id,\n            appointment.AppointmentDateTime,\n            appointment.Reason,\n            appointment.Status.ToString(),\n            appointment.Notes,\n            appointment.RescheduleReason,\n            appointment.PatientId,\n            appointment.Patient?.Name,\n            appointment.VetId,\n            appointment.Vet is null ? null : $\"{appointment.Vet.FirstName} {appointment.Vet.LastName}\".Trim(),\n            appointment.AppointmentServices.Select(x =\u003e x.ServiceId).OrderBy(x =\u003e x).ToArray());\n    }\n\n    public sealed record AppointmentToolDto(\n        int Id,\n        DateTime AppointmentDateTime,\n        string? Reason,\n        string Status,\n        string? Notes,\n        string? RescheduleReason,\n        int PatientId,\n        string? PatientName,\n        int VetId,\n        string? VetName,\n        int[] ServiceIds);\n}\n"
